title: JLL India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: JLL India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? JLL India in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About JLL India:
JLL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with JLL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
